name: Danhua Chemical Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: Danhua Chemical Technology Co.,Ltd manufactures and sells various chemical products in China. The company offers ethylene glycol for use in the production of polyester fibers, films, packaging resins, antifreeze, and low melting point explosives, as well as auxiliary agents for the dye industry and lubricants for tobacco, cosmetics, and other applications. It also provides oxalic acid for use as an intermediate or reagent in the synthesis of chemicals, including starch hydrolysis to produce pure dextrin and glucose, oxalate reagents, synthetic oxalates, oxalates, etc. for the chemical industry; in the manufacture of chlortetracycline, vitamin B2, and streptomycin for the pharmaceutical industry; in the textile printing and dyeing industry for cotton, wool, and coal dyes, as well as leather tanning and bleaching, and plywood bleaching; and in the metallurgical industry to refine high-purity nickel, rare earth, and other metals, as well as manufacture of carbon rods. In addition, the company offers catalyst products, such as dehydrogenation, synthetic, and hydrogenation catalyst, as well as acetic anhydride. Danhua Chemical Technology Co.,Ltd was founded in 1993 and is based in Shanghai, China.
